content.full_text:
March 28, 1990

VIA FEDERAL EXPRESS

Ms. Carla Wardlow
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95814

Dear Carla:

I would appreciate it if you would confirm your telephone advice to me today that a corporation which uses its offices and telephones in connection with an independent expenditure campaign does not incur any reportable independent expenditures under 2 Cal. Code Regs. § 18225 unless (1) ongoing business overhead is increased by virtue of such use or (2) employee time reaches the 10% threshold set forth in 2 Cal. Code Regs. § 18423.

Thank you for your attention on this matter.

Very truly yours,

Frederick K. Lowell
